headline: Datadog (DDOG) Stock Is Up, What You Need To Know
summary: Shares of cloud monitoring platform Datadog (NASDAQ:DDOG) jumped 3.3% in the afternoon session after comments from President Trump regarding talks with Iran sparked a broad market rally.

headline: Salesforce vs. Datadog: Which Cloud Software Stock Has an Edge?
